name: Castle Pals
author: Poki
description: Castle Pals is a retro level-based platform game where two best friends must storm the castle! Each of you has your own special abilities: either as a hard-hitting fighter or a graceful flyer. Avoid fireballs, goblins, and more as you make your way through the castle. Challenge yourself to go for the gold and complete each level under a certain amount of time! Can you guide the Castle Pals through all 40 action-packed levels? How to play: Move - Arrow keys Attack - Z About the creator: Castle Pals was created by Brad Erkkila. Check out their other game on Poki : Squish Machine
